name: test_login_scenarios[TC_AUTH_LOGIN_003-data2]
description:
POST /login — parametrized across 5 login scenarios:
          TC_AUTH_LOGIN_001: valid credentials   → 200 + token
          TC_AUTH_LOGIN_002: wrong password      → 400 + error  [xfail: ReqRes demo limitation]
          TC_AUTH_LOGIN_003: unknown email       → 400 + error
          TC_AUTH_LOGIN_004: missing password    → 400 + error
          TC_AUTH_LOGIN_005: empty payload       → 400 + error
descriptionHtml:
POST /login — parametrized across 5 login scenarios:
      TC_AUTH_LOGIN_001: valid credentials   → 200 + token
      TC_AUTH_LOGIN_002: wrong password      → 400 + error  [xfail: ReqRes demo limitation]
      TC_AUTH_LOGIN_003: unknown email       → 400 + error
      TC_AUTH_LOGIN_004: missing password    → 400 + error
      TC_AUTH_LOGIN_005: empty payload       → 400 + error
statusMessage:
AssertionError: [TC_AUTH_LOGIN_003] Unknown email — expect 400 and error
    Expected 400, got 429. Body: {'error': 'rate_limit_exceeded', 'message': "You've hit the free-tier limit of 250 requests/day.", 'upgrade': {'message': 'Lite ($5/mo): 10,000 requests/day with commercial use license.
